$description: Interaction-state constants captured 1:1 from the current cva variants (components/ui/button.tsx et al.). Hand-owned. Hover fills currently use Tailwind alpha modifiers / color-mix in class strings — these tokens document those constants so Phase 4 can wire them.

disabled-opacity.$description: disabled:opacity-50 — used by every interactive component.

hover-opacity.$description: Fill strength for hover on NON-brand surfaces only (secondary, destructive tints). It is NOT used on primary any more: fading a mid-tone fill toward the page lightens it, and white text on the faded teal falls to 3.38:1. Primary hover uses --primary-hover (a darker shade) instead.

secondary-hover-mix.$description: Secondary hover mixes 5% foreground into the fill (color-mix in button.tsx).
